global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a logo, headline, and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting DriftPass with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo with the text 'DriftPass' prominently displayed at the top center.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a lighter shade of orange.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter' in a large, bold font, positioned centrally with a smaller subtitle below it.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that reads 'Flexible booking options' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Watch now' in white on an orange background.

elements.label: 30% discount badge
elements.description: A small, bold text badge at the bottom left corner displaying '30%' in white on an orange background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, DriftPass, flexible booking options
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fly smarter, Flexible booking options, DriftPass, Watch now, 30%
